author: anon-a7c6025f
content: GPU environment: RTX 3090 24GB via WSL2, driver 571.96. CUDA driver API available at /usr/lib/wsl/lib/. No CUDA toolkit installed — cuBLAS/cuDNN/cuFFT unavailable. Scoping Phase 6 to: device management, GPU memory allocation, host<->device transfers, custom PTX kernels for elementwise ops. cuBLAS matmul and cuDNN conv deferred until toolkit is installed.
